Great place for a company off-site
The room was quiet and comfortable.  The restaurant had great Italian food.  The event spaces downstairs were functional and well appointed!.I really liked the wine tasting in the lobby at the end of the day! ?. I would definitely stay here again.Thank you for choosing to stay with us and allowing us to serve you. We hope to see you again soon and surpass all expectations once again. Safe travels.

Excellent. Hotter.
The rooms were large and very beautiful and good hotels. The ancillary equipment was also very good.

Excellent hotel
Very good hotel, spacious rooms, extremely quiet neighborhood, located very close to train and bus stations. For a while you are in museums, and historical sites of interest. Very good and hearty breakfast although little varied. I'd come back.

Foodie delights!
Check-in was smooth and the digital key is really helpful - my husband was able to share it with me so I could check-in a littler early in the day whilst he came later after work. Yet another brilliant stay at this hotel. Venera and the team always make us feel welcome by doing something creative. This time catering created something lovely for our family with a humorous (and yummy) nod to Halloween.

Lovely hotel!
A lovely hotel with a fantastic dining experience. Dinner was absolutely delicious and beautifully presented.

The best your staff
A good hotel ideal for going with children. The staff is very friendly and friendly, which makes our stays there always a pleasure. We stay at the whenever we go to visit family. Highly recommended accommodation

Great hotel
Great hotel, comfortable and very friendly. Breakfast is above average, with a lot of options and included in price. Overall, great stay

Great hotel.
Great hotel. Sing was fantastic. Great service ?

atmospheric hotel
A wonderful smaller hotel, that invites you to relax and be present. It has a warm, sensuous atmosphere. Love is put into the details. The breakfast buffet is not a large machine like you see in big tourist hotels. On the other hand, there is a delicious breakfast menu selected with care and awareness. Good service. The cocoa machine was broken, and the waiter immediately made a homemeade hot chocolate for our 8-year-old for breakfast. Next day the machine was fixed. 5 star for that kind of hospitality alone.
